gold_change_reason: Added handling for extra columns and missing optional Charge column; strengthened for edge cases (empty annotations, charge defaults, duplicate proteins).
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests with extra columns and missing Charge column.
Scaled executable cases must include tests for empty fragment annotations, charge NA/empty, and duplicate protein entries.
implementation_notes: Uses header_dict to locate columns, gracefully handles missing 'Charge' by defaulting to '0', returns early when fragment annotations are empty, avoids duplicate peptides in protein_mapping.
